{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175054682563F010796AA39DF3"}"},"total":1708},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7609339015114703641","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好赤爱赤喜欢赤
近期日更两章，合四千到五千余字，无爆更迹象

设定上是快穿式的，但目前字数较少，还只在第一个世界，快穿多见，但外加重女，弹幕，百合，目前还看到修罗场，那确实不多见了，希望大大加油写下去

节奏很舒服，心理活动也合理，弹幕穿插也不突兀，没有把弹幕用来灌水，也没有忘记弹幕设定（不能怪我单独把这个拿出来说[捂脸]，只能说见多了）

感觉主角是偏理性的冷淡系性格，这种性格很合我口味，当然，这只是第一个世界里的表现，不清楚作者是打算怎么处理的，是本体性格主导，然后各个世界里有所成长？还是像单元剧那样，主角本体只是条线索，各世界主角性格之类的纯看设定？看后续吧

作者大大还请努力产粮，读者们可都是嗷嗷待哺啊
（据说十来万字才会多给推流，作者还请努力🙏🏻）
（另外，首页通知）","text_exts":[{"e":82,"s":79,"text":"修罗场","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740002546AA39DF3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227609339015114703641%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227601443014237506585%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771689865,"group_id":"7601443014237506585","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"愿粟廪万仓，律法尽善","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9950C7N6X+/iAz3Hsiz6Es=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ec467f22185b4df0be9a93e350ca69e5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536232&x-signature=STqqbDIt7J78LfCwKBUnVtHmbk4%3D","user_id":"111030881188","user_name":"粟律"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111030881188","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":42,"fan_ranklist_title":"铁杆粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1737770612,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601443014237506585","book_info":{"abstract":"【番剧剧本】【无限流】【沉重系】【扭曲】【变百】
提问，如果让你穿越到各个动漫世界中，你会选择以怎样的角色塑造成为人气第一？
作为饱读番剧的牢二次元，面对此等问题，洛羽毫不犹豫地选择了颇具戏剧与乐子效果的败犬+沉重系角色这一选项。
只是....
“...为什么每个番剧到了最后，身边的人都比我更重力呢？”
“这不重要，我更好奇，宿主你真的是演的吗？”
“我觉得我是。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a3601c89bd4af62537c09566c3a22987","author":"无人风","author_id":"","book_id":"7601443014237506585","book_name":"弹幕怎么都说我是真重女？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e89038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"29.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601806081110573593","read_count":"297055","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"258794"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"71","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,无限流,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/dcc39d05adaffeba760e7e449010ca6f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184254&x-signature=M%2BICS7nylsqhN%2B5J5E1gjlZSGY0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1693674682980135","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"24"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175054682563F010796AA39DF3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读59分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":70,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3549,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":24907},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617082839221306174","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，给我的想象空间很强，在网络小说这方面还能看出一定文学却不影响剧情和全文构造的，也算少见，不过这也更能恰当证明作者的文笔；语言上描写有关主角的情感，带着说不出的细腻，动作描写也不错，角色构造也很足，给我的感觉就是一本很好很好的书，看完之后回味感也很强（其实我有点放不下东城玲奈和雪代凛，还缓了一会才接着往下看）

人话就是，吃了那么久的史，终于吃到饭了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773491964,"group_id":"7601443014237506585","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3LIWptlzh45df8nS5R+hDA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b0039b506e4e4fc79bdc401d7e81eba2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536538&x-signature=DCsvcbmGgBYG%2BeuW2%2FESGySQm8k%3D","user_id":"92382407647","user_name":"磕学研究者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"92382407647","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601443014237506585","book_info":{"abstract":"【番剧剧本】【无限流】【沉重系】【扭曲】【变百】
